mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, CHECK_NO AS checkNo, WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, CHECK_DATE AS checkDate, CHECK_START_DATE AS checkStartDate, CHECK_END_DATE AS checkEndDate, CHECK_TITLE AS checkTitle, CHECK_TYPE AS checkType, CASE WHEN CHECK_TYPE = 1 THEN '全量盘点' WHEN CHECK_TYPE = 2 THEN '部分盘点' ELSE '未知' END AS checkTypeName, CHECK_STATUS AS checkStatus, CASE WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 0 THEN '待盘点' WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 1 THEN '盘点中' WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 3 THEN '已调整' ELSE '未知' END AS checkStatusName, CHECK_PERSON_ID AS checkPersonId, CHECK_PERSON_NAME AS checkPersonName, REMARK AS remark, CREATE_BY AS createBy, CREATE_BY_NAME AS createByName, CREATE_TIME AS createTime, UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, UPDATE_BY_NAME AS updateByName, UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK ( ID, CHECK_NO, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, CHECK_DATE, CHECK_START_DATE, CHECK_END_DATE, CHECK_TITLE, CHECK_TYPE, CHECK_STATUS, CHECK_PERSON_ID, CHECK_PERSON_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{checkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{checkStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{checkEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{checkTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{checkStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{checkPersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{checkPersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK
WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WAREHOUSE_NAME = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CHECK_DATE = #{checkDate,jdbcType=DATE},
CHECK_START_DATE = #{checkStartDate,jdbcType=DATE},
CHECK_END_DATE = #{checkEndDate,jdbcType=DATE},
CHECK_TITLE = #{checkTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CHECK_TYPE = #{checkType,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CHECK_STATUS = #{checkStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CHECK_PERSON_ID = #{checkPersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CHECK_PERSON_NAME = #{checkPersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK SET DEL_FLAG = 1, UPDATE_TIME = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, CHECK_ID AS checkId, MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, SPECIFICATION_MODEL AS specificationModel, UNIT_CODE AS unitCode, UNIT_NAME AS unitName, BOOK_QUANTITY AS bookQuantity, CHECK_QUANTITY AS checkQuantity, DIFFERENCE_QUANTITY AS differenceQuantity, DIFFERENCE_TYPE AS differenceType, CASE WHEN DIFFERENCE_TYPE = 1 THEN '盘盈' WHEN DIFFERENCE_TYPE = 2 THEN '盘亏' WHEN DIFFERENCE_TYPE = 0 THEN '无差异' ELSE '未知' END AS differenceTypeName, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID AS warehouseInDetailId, CHECK_STATUS AS checkStatus, CASE WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 0 THEN '待盘点' WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 1 THEN '已盘点' ELSE '未知' END AS checkStatusName, REMARK AS remark, AUDIT_BY AS auditBy, AUDIT_BY_NAME AS auditByName, AUDIT_TIME AS auditTime FROM E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK_DETAIL WHERE CHECK_ID = #{checkId} ORDER BY MATERIAL_NAME
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK_DETAIL ( ID, CHECK_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, BOOK_QUANTITY, CHECK_QUANTITY, DIFFERENCE_QUANTITY, DIFFERENCE_TYPE, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID, CHECK_STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.checkId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bookQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.checkQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.differenceQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.differenceType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.warehouseInDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.checkStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK_DETAIL ( ID, CHECK_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, BOOK_QUANTITY, CHECK_QUANTITY, DIFFERENCE_QUANTITY, DIFFERENCE_TYPE, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID, CHECK_STATUS, CREATE_TIME ) SELECT SEQ_STOCK_CHECK_DETAIL_ID.NEXTVAL, #{checkId}, WID.MATERIAL_ID, WID.MATERIAL_NAME, WID.SPECIFICATION, WID.UNIT_CODE, WID.UNIT, WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY, NULL, 0, 0, WID.ID, 0, SYSDATE FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID WHERE WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND WI.ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = 1 AND WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY > 0
mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, CHECK_ID AS checkId, MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, SPECIFICATION_MODEL AS specificationModel, UNIT_CODE AS unitCode, UNIT_NAME AS unitName, BOOK_QUANTITY AS bookQuantity, CHECK_QUANTITY AS checkQuantity, DIFFERENCE_QUANTITY AS differenceQuantity, DIFFERENCE_TYPE AS differenceType, CASE WHEN DIFFERENCE_TYPE = 1 THEN '盘盈' WHEN DIFFERENCE_TYPE = 2 THEN '盘亏' WHEN DIFFERENCE_TYPE = 0 THEN '无差异' ELSE '未知' END AS differenceTypeName, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID AS warehouseInDetailId, CHECK_STATUS AS checkStatus, CASE WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 0 THEN '待盘点' WHEN CHECK_STATUS = 1 THEN '已盘点' ELSE '未知' END AS checkStatusName, REMARK AS remark, AUDIT_BY AS auditBy, AUDIT_BY_NAME AS auditByName, AUDIT_TIME AS auditTime FROM E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK_DETAIL WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_STOCK_CHECK_DETAIL
CHECK_STATUS = #{checkStatus},
BOOK_QUANTITY = #{bookQuantity},
CHECK_QUANTITY = #{checkQuantity},
DIFFERENCE_QUANTITY = #{differenceQuantity},
DIFFERENCE_TYPE = #{differenceType},
REMARK = #{remark},
AUDIT_BY = #{loginUserId},
AUDIT_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName},
AUDIT_TIME = SYSDATE
WHERE ID = #{id}
